case_title: DESOTO CAB COMPANY VS. HECTOR LORIA GARZA

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DESOTO CAB COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 9/16/14. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
